calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-15-2004 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jan-06-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Noreen Ikeuye.
Douglas Holloway, Esq. for Plaintiff Trinity Capital Corp.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendants NMMH Enterprises Inc. dba Swan Cleaners and Nazir Mithani.
Damages of $95,646.56
Attorney's fees of $2,500.00
Costs of $364.50
Interest $ 4,978.00
For the total of $103,489.06
Plaintiff is entitled to the immediate possession and recovering of the leased equipments listed as EXHIBIT "A" to the JUDGMENT, and Defendant shll receive all credits of the sells they are entitled by law.
Judgment signed in open court.
